---
title: "Unit 6: Computer algebra systems and symbolic computation"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
    highlight-style: tango
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---

# Unit 6: Computer algebra systems and symbolic computation

This lecture is presented in a [Jupyter notebook](https://github.com/yoninazarathy/ProgrammingCourse-with-Julia-SimulationAnalysisAndLearningSystems/blob/main/lectures_jupyter/unit_6.ipynb).
